p: StegoShard is a zero-knowledge, offline-first tool.

p.b: It does not collect, transmit, or sell any personal data.

ul: are processed entirely on your device. Files are encrypted locally (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM) before being turned into images. Your password is never stored and never leaves your device.
, only a password-wrapped key and non-sensitive preferences are stored locally in the browser. The wrapped key is useless without your password. Nothing is synced to any server.

ul.b: no analytics, no telemetry, and no tracking

ul: , and makes no network requests for its core features (Disk and Paper).

p: The Google Photos destination is opt-in and off unless you enable it. When enabled, encrypted images are uploaded to
(into an album the extension creates), and restoring downloads images you select with Google's Picker. This happens directly between your browser and Google;

p.b: StegoShard operates no servers and receives none of this data.

p: Your use of Google Photos is governed by Google's own privacy policy. The extension only ever handles already-encrypted images and cannot read your other photos.

ul: — save the wrapped key and preferences locally.
and the Google host permissions — optional, requested only if you use Google Photos.

p: Export, re-password, or erase your key at any time from the settings. Uninstalling the extension removes all local data.

ul: You are responsible for your password and key.

ul.b: If you lose your password or key, your data is permanently unrecoverable

ul: — no one can restore it for you.
Keep multiple copies of your images across independent locations. Do not rely on any single medium, and never treat Google Photos as your only copy.
Use StegoShard only for lawful purposes and only with data you are entitled to store.

p: The optional Google Photos destination interacts directly with your own Google account and is additionally governed by Google's terms and policies.
These terms may change; updates are published on this page. Continued use after a change constitutes acceptance.
